data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a full audit trail for delegation actions, specifically 'who delegated what and when'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding delegation actions or the associated audit trail. The linked use case and prior steps focus on other functionalities, indicating a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail for delegation actions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add audit trail verification
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the audit trail captures delegation actions with timestamps and user identifiers.
